column1: DemandScience — Icon Reference (Google Material Symbols Rounded)
Import into Google Sheets. All icons must use Rounded style only.

column2: No Font Awesome · No Heroicons · No Feather · No Lucide
Always use Rounded style — the URL must include ?icon.style=Rounded when browsing
Navy #061947 or Electric Blue #0266F7 only — no pink / no off-palette icon colors
FILL=0 (default/outlined weight) for most uses · FILL=1 only for active or selected states
Minimum 44×44px touch/click target area even if icon is smaller
Always pair icons with text labels in navigation and key actions
On white: use a small Baby Blue (#CDEDFD) or Light Grey (#F8F9FB) circle behind icons when visual anchoring is needed
